pending_falsification_questions.text: Are the same KPI dimensions (segments, organic-growth split, headline-profit decomposition) disclosed in Q1 2026 as in Q2 2025?

ted.narrative: TED returned 0 notices where Qben Infra AB appears as a winner. TED carries only EU-directive-threshold awards (~NOK 45M for works); a smaller-scale supplier may legitimately have no TED footprint. This is weaker than Doffin absence.

payload_summary.ted_threshold_caveat: TED carries EU-directive-threshold notices only (~NOK 45M for works, ~NOK 1.4-2M for goods/services). Absence on TED is weaker evidence than absence on Doffin.

derived_revenue_support.narrative: Only 25% of 4 operating subsidiaries show a post-acquisition prime-contract footprint in Doffin or TED (4 awards). This is below the 50% external-support threshold; reported revenue of 169.0 MSEK is poorly grounded in public-registry order flow.

derived_explanatory_slippage.narrative: Revenue declined (-13.3%) and EBITA margin is -26.0%, yet the CEO-comment region contains 12 positive-framing tokens and zero acknowledgement tokens. Pure positive framing despite a negative directional move -- classic explanatory slippage.

offending_sentences: Delårsrapport Q1 2026 Click or tap here to enter text. 2 (31) Fokusering och lönsamhet Qben Infra har gått in i 2026 med en tydlig riktning.
Med B45 Anlegg ombord stärker vi vår närvaro infrastruktur, med målet att driva högre tillväxt och ytterligare och täcker nu även kustlinjen från Oslo till lönsamhet.

Under kvartalet ingick vi 2026 och ger nu en mer renodlad och slagkraftig dessutom ett strategiskt partnerskap med Byhmgard för plattform. att utveckla storskaliga energilagringsprojekt i norra Europa – ett område där vi ser växande behov och Efter ett händelserikt 2025 slutförde vi de strategiska attraktiva möjligheter. avyttringarna av Kvalitetsbygg och Rail under första kvartalet 2026.

Tillsammans med den pågående processen Marknadens drivkrafter är fortsatt starka. att avyttra Inspekt – där vi har tecknat en Energiomställning, elektrifiering och modernisering av avsiktsförklaring – blir Qben Infra både tydligare och mer åldrande infrastruktur skapar långsiktig, strukturell fokuserat.

Inom Qben Power har vi stärkt vår kapacitet genom förvärvet av B45 Anlegg AS – en snabbväxande specialist Sammanfattningsvis befinner sig Qben Infra i början av en inom betongarbeten för kritisk infrastruktur såsom ny fas.

category_rule_notes: R7 (revenue_pipeline_support): both derived dimensions refute (revenue_support=refutes, explanatory_slippage=refutes). Two independent axes failing in the same direction is treated as critical even without peer-tap confirms.

external_collision_v9.claim: Qben Infra's Q1 2026 reported continuing-operations revenue of 169 MSEK is grounded in real external order flow from Norwegian and EU public-sector buyers, and the CEO narrative description of the quarter is consistent with the measured revenue trajectory (no explanatory slippage between negative numbers and uniformly positive language).

pending_falsification_questions.text: Does the entity appear as a named subcontractor on prime contracts in the claimed domain?

doffin.narrative: Doffin returned 0 search hits and 0 confirmed awards for SLAM Jernbaneteknikk AS. For a Norwegian state-rail-adjacent specialist this is the canonical registry; absence is a weak-to-moderate refute. Subcontractor chains, private-sector clients, and consortium framework agreements remain as alternative hypotheses that this tap cannot test.

brreg.narrative: BRREG resolved 'SLAM Jernbaneteknikk AS' to orgnr 926465252 'SLAM JERNBANETEKNIKK AS' (match=exact+naics, 8 candidates inspected from the top page; BRREG free-text search reports 433581 dataset entries containing any of the name tokens). Founded 2021-01-13 (~5.4 years old). Reports 36 employees. NAICS=42.120 (Bygging av jernbaner og undergrunnsbaner).

payload_summary.ted_threshold_caveat: TED carries EU-directive-threshold notices only (~NOK 45M for works, ~NOK 1.4-2M for goods/services). Absence on TED is weaker evidence than absence on Doffin.
